sources.name: BSIA
sources.dataset: British Security Industry Association CCTV Survey

sources.name: Home Office
sources.dataset: Police Powers and Procedures: Stop and Search

sources.name: CIVICUS
sources.dataset: State of Civil Society Report — UK Country Rating

metadata.methodology: CCTV camera estimates from BSIA industry survey extrapolated using camera density growth rates. Stop and search rates per 1,000 population from Home Office Stats19 equivalent for policing powers. CIVICUS civic space rating uses 5-point scale (Open, Narrowed, Obstructed, Repressed, Closed).
knownIssues: CCTV estimates are industry estimates with significant uncertainty; no central register exists; actual numbers may be higher
Stop and search data excludes counter-terrorism powers under Schedule 7 of the Terrorism Act 2000
CIVICUS ratings combine subjective expert assessment with incident reporting; methodology has changed over time
